course: TPC Toronto at Osprey Valley (North Course)

sg_weights._note: TPC Toronto (Osprey Valley North): Par-71, 7397y. Bentgrass at 12.0 stimp. APP elevated (150-200 range dominant per COURSE_DNA_LIBRARY w-weights). PUTT moderate-high (consistent bentgrass). ARG and OTT roughly neutral (moderate rough 1.02, par-71 with some longer holes). Derived knowledge-based from COURSE_DNA_LIBRARY entry (no explicit sg_weights).

course_weight_override._note: Standard weights. TPC Toronto returned to RBC Canadian Open in 2022; 4 years of course history expected. Confidence moderate — increase to 0.24/0.19 if Phase 1 coverage > 40%.

course_history_note: RBC Canadian Open returned to TPC Toronto at Osprey Valley in 2022 (previously at Hamilton G&CC and other venues). History available 2022-2025 under event_id=32. If Phase 1 returns 0 history, investigate whether pre-2022 years are indexed under a different event_id or course_key. No fallback entry in COURSE_HISTORY_FALLBACKS.json for id=32 (standard direct lookup).
winner_archetype: Precision iron player who can putt on fast bentgrass. TPC Toronto (Osprey Valley North) is a demanding parkland course with tight fairways and bentgrass greens at 12.0 stimp. Par-71 means distance is less of a differentiator than accuracy and approach precision. Recent Canadian Open history includes strong iron players and complete golfers who combine solid ball-striking with reliable putting. Not a course that favors pure bombers.
bbi_pipeline_action: FULL — Standard individual BBI v8.5 rankings. TPC Toronto course history available 2022-2025 (4 years). Phase 1 should return moderate field coverage (30-50%). Watch for course history 0-coverage flag — if all NO_HISTORY, investigate before generating rankings.
course_notes: TPC Toronto at Osprey Valley (North Course), Caledon ON. Par-71, 7397y. Host of RBC Canadian Open since 2022 return. Parkland layout with bentgrass greens, moderate rough. Two sets of tees used for tournament play. Course management premium — tight driving corridors. Strong 2022-2025 results field required to validate course fit layer.
pipeline_warning: REMINDER — Check Phase 1 course history coverage before generating rankings. Memorial Tournament (week 18) had 0% coverage due to unknown bug. Verify event_id=32 returns historical rounds data before Apollo runs.
